description:
Advances: specled.spec_review.per_subject_tabs, specled.spec_review.change_scoped_overview

spec_tab_label (html.ex:1524) counts only requirements.added/modified — removed is ignored and scenarios are never counted. search.benchmark in atlas PR 62 (−1 requirement, −1 scenario) labels 'Spec · unchanged' while the overview correctly says '-1 removed'. coverage_tab_label has the same blind spot. Separately, default_pivot (html.ex:1489) prefers Code whenever code changed, so clicking a 'Spec edits in this change' overview entry lands on the Code tab.

Fix: extend spec_change_counts with −N removed; include scenario changes in the label (or a second count); make overview spec-edit links carry an explicit tab target that activates the Spec pivot on arrival. SpecDiff.compute already returns removed for both requirements and scenarios — data layer needs no change.
title: Spec/Coverage tab labels ignore removals and scenarios; overview spec-edit links land on Code tab
